title: terminalia mantaliopsis var. graminifolia
intro: Terminalia mantaliopsis var. graminifolia, also known as a type of Terminalia plant, is a species of plant that belongs to the Combretaceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its antipyretic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Terminalia mantaliopsis var. graminifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
